name: TestIso11783IL_PDDDelete
title: TestIso11783IL_PDDDelete
tables: Deletes the process data directory and disconnects from the Task Controller. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
0: process data directory has been deleted successfully <0: an error has occurred
